zh.lifeSummary: 當Pierre IV de ROSTRENEN於1245年出生在法國布列塔尼o-度-諾爾德洛斯特倫時，他的父親Pierre III de ROSTRENEN36歲，母親Jeanne de PARTHENAY28歲。他於1265年與Nicole de VITRÉ在法國布列塔尼結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1307年3月11日在法國布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫吉加普享年62歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pierre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: probably a contracted form of  Jep , vernacular form of   Jacob   .

en.lifeSummary: When Pierre IV de ROSTRENEN was born in 1245, in Rostrenen, Côtes-du-Nord, Brittany, France, his father, Pierre III de ROSTRENEN, was 36 and his mother, Jeanne de PARTHENAY, was 28. He married Nicole de VITRÉ in 1265, in Brittany, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 11 March 1307, in Guingamp, Côtes-d'Armor, Brittany, France, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Pierre IV de ROSTRENEN est né en 1245, à Rostrenen, Côtes-du-Nord, Bretagne, France, son père, Pierre III de ROSTRENEN, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de PARTHENAY, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Nicole de VITRÉ en 1265, à Bretagne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 11 mars 1307, à Guingamp, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Pierre IV de ROSTRENEN 1245 in Rostrenen, Côtes-du-Nord, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Pierre III de ROSTRENEN 36 und seine Mutter Jeanne de PARTHENAY 28. Er hat 1265 in Bretagne, Frankreich Nicole de VITRÉ geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 11. März 1307 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Guingamp, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Pierre IV de ROSTRENEN è nato il nel 1245 nel Rostrenen, Côtes-du-Nord, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Pierre III de ROSTRENEN, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Jeanne de PARTHENAY, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Nicole de VITRÉ nel 1265, nel Bretagne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 11 marzo 1307, nel Guingamp, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Pierre IV de ROSTRENENが1245年にフランスブレタグンクoテス-ドウ-ノードロストリーンで生まれた時，父Pierre III de ROSTRENENは36歳，母Jeanne de PARTHENAYは28歳であった。1265年にフランスブレタグンでNicole de VITRÉと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1307年3月11日にフランスブレタグンクoテス-ド'アルモーグインガンップで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Pierre IV de ROSTRENEN(이)가 1245년 프랑스 브레타그니 co츠-드-노르드 로스트렌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Pierre III de ROSTRENEN(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Jeanne de PARTHENAY(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1265년 프랑스 브레타그니에서 Nicole de VITRÉ(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1307년 3월 11일 프랑스 브레타그니 co츠-드'아모르 길그가프에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Pierre IV de ROSTRENEN nasceu em 1245, em Rostrenen, Côtes-du-Nord, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Pierre III de ROSTRENEN, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de PARTHENAY, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Nicole de VITRÉ em 1265, em Bretagne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de março de 1307, em Guingamp, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, França, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Pierre IV de ROSTRENEN родился в 1245 г. в местности ростринен, кoтес-ду-норд, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Pierre III de ROSTRENEN было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de PARTHENAY, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Nicole de VITRÉ в 1265 г. в местности бретагн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 11 марта 1307 г. в местности гуингамп, кoтес-д'армор, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Pierre IV de ROSTRENEN nació en 1245, en Rostrenen, Côtes-du-Nord, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Pierre III de ROSTRENEN, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Jeanne de PARTHENAY, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Nicole de VITRÉ en 1265, en Bretagne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 11 de marzo de 1307, en Guingamp, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 62 años.
